Retractable Banner Material & Sizing for Event Displays

If you are looking for signage options that are quick and easy to set up and pack away, then our retractable banners are the perfect product for you. There are options for smaller and larger banner retractor stands to ensure that regardless of your situation, you'll have a banner stand that truly fits the bill.

Our retractable banners are designed with the idea of ease and impact in mind. These banners provide the best of both worlds, as they offer you the same high quality you've come to expect from our vinyl banners while providing you with a retractable stand and carrying case! Your retractable banner stands tall, almost like a beacon attracting your dear customers right to you.

Available Sizes for Custom Retractable Banners

  • Mini Retractor: 16" x 8" - Perfect for tabletop displays
  • Retractor Lite 24: 78" x 24" - Compact vertical display
  • Retractor Lite 31: 78" x 31" - Standard trade show size
  • Retractor Lite 33: 78" x 33" - Popular event display
  • Retractor Lite 36: 78" x 36" - Medium format display
  • Retractor Lite 47: 78" x 47" - Large format display
  • Telescoping Retractor: 79" x 31" - Adjustable height

Banner Stand Materials for Trade Show Displays

  • 13 oz Vinyl - Durable outdoor material with UV resistance
  • 14 oz Vinyl - Premium vinyl for high-traffic displays
  • Fabric - Wrinkle-resistant material for professional presentations

Trade Show & Event Uses for Retractable Banners

Retractable banners provide versatile display solutions for professional events, marketing campaigns, and business presentations.

Trade Show Applications

  • Booth displays and backdrop signage
  • Product announcements and promotional messaging
  • Company branding at conference venues
  • Directional signage for large exhibition halls

Corporate Event Displays

  • Conference registration and welcome signage
  • Speaker introductions and presentation support
  • Award ceremony and recognition events
  • Training sessions and corporate meetings

Retail & Business Locations

  • Storefront promotional displays
  • Seasonal sale and event announcements
  • New product launches and featured items
  • Grand opening and special event signage

Educational & Non-Profit Events

  • School fundraising and awareness campaigns
  • Career fairs and recruitment events
  • Community outreach and information booths
  • Health fairs and educational presentations
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractable Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Ensure your banner stands look professional with proper artwork specifications and design guidelines.

File Format Requirements

  • PDF files preferred for best quality output
  • High-resolution JPEG or PNG files accepted
  • Adobe Illustrator (.ai) and Photoshop (.psd) files supported
  • Minimum 150 DPI resolution at full print size

Design Specifications

  • Include 0.125" bleed area around all edges
  • Keep important text and logos 0.25" from edges
  • Use CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction
  • Embed all fonts or convert text to outlines

Design Templates Available

  • Free templates for all banner stand sizes
  • Industry-specific design options
  • Customizable layouts with your branding
  • Professional design services available

Artwork Support Services

  • Free digital proofs for artwork approval
  • Design consultation with graphics team
  • File format conversion assistance
  • Color matching and print optimization

Order Custom Retractable Banners for Your Next Event

Ready to make an impact at your next trade show or business event? Our custom retractable banners combine professional printing quality with portable convenience, giving you the perfect display solution for any venue.

When you are in need of signage for your trade shows, holiday work events, or a new addition to spruce up your storefront, retractable banners offer a practical yet effective solution. Whether you need a small, mini retractor for your booth or stand or a bigger banner stand to pair next to your table, we blend the correct level of craftsmanship with a customer focused approach. This ensures that your retractable banner looks great while standing tall.

Why Choose Our Retractable Banner Stands

  • Professional hardware with carrying cases included
  • Fast 1-5 day production with next-day shipping available
  • Free design proofs and artwork support
  • Multiple material options for any budget or application
  • Replacement banners available without purchasing new stands

For a complete event setup, explore our versatile fabric banners or professional step-and-repeat banners for branded backdrops.

Unmatched Customer Service

At Banners.com, we don't just sell retractable banners; we deliver exceptional service designed to exceed expectations at every step. Customers like Gary have experienced this firsthand, sharing: "I was amazed with the customer service! Quick response to my questions. Joe responded to me within minutes, answered all my questions, and revised my proof to perfection. Great company to do business with!!!"

Here's what makes our customer service stand out:

  • Live Design Support: Our experts provide real-time guidance, ensuring your retractable banner display perfectly represents your brand.
  • Free Proofing Services: We offer free digital proofs of all custom prints so you can review and refine every detail before production begins.
  • Fast Turnaround & Next-Day Shipping: Lightning-fast production with next-day shipping options on most orders.
  • Dedicated Customer Service: For bulk or complex orders, our account managers make the process seamless.
  • Satisfaction Guarantee: Your satisfaction is our priority. If you're not 100% happy with your banner, we will work together on a solution.
PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractable Banner Stand FAQ

What is a retractable banner stand?

A retractable banner stand is a portable display where the banner rolls into the base for easy transport and storage, and it includes a carrying case.

What sizes are available for retractable banners?

Sizes range from tabletop mini banners (16" × 8") to large, wide format options (78" × 47"), with popular standard sizes like 78" × 24" and 78" × 33".

What materials are retractable banners printed on?

Retractable banners are available in 13 oz vinyl, 14 oz vinyl, and fabric materials, each designed for different display environments and durability requirements.

Can I customize my retractable banner design?

Yes—upload your own file, customize a template, or work with a designer to create your banner. We provide free digital proofs for approval before printing.

How are retractable banners printed?

Retractable banners are digitally printed in full CMYK color using UV fade-resistant inks for vibrant, long-lasting displays.

Can I order a replacement retractable banner without buying a new stand?

Yes—you can order a replacement banner without purchasing a new base kit, making it cost-effective to update your displays with new messaging or designs.
